articles.title: It is only the fourth time since 2010 that Milan has managed to obtain at least 60 points after 28 games
articles.summary: Milan (60 in 2025/26) achieved 60 points in the first 28 matches played for the fourth time since the beginning of the last decade in Serie A, after 2010/11 (61), 2011/12 (60) and 2021/22 (60). Opta reports it.
